name: 29Metals Limited
analysis: 29M has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 59% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.2750, stop A$0.2203, target A$0.3275 (0.96:1) — then trail it.
